rationale: The current selected translation (36a7577b) is excellent. It captures the informal, punchy style of the original English text ('so fetch', 'nope, and not even a little'). It correctly handles the technical code blocks and preserves the MDX structure. The previously identified typo 'lostiempos' and the hyphenated 'Anti‑Patrón' appear to have been already corrected or were misidentified in the previous judge report as they do not appear in the provided MDX source for the selected commit.

suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
